trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
SetWeather(1)
TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_1", 1024, CVector(946.729, 430.205, 484.307), {"MirotvorecShot_2"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_2", 1024, CVector(906.503, 428.754, 488.476), {"Ural01"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_3", 1024, CVector(871.221, 426.027, 497.684), {"Cruiser01"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_4", 1024, CVector(948.900, 429.988, 497.776), {"CoolBelaz"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_5", 1024, CVector(912.617, 428.557, 502.247), {"CoolBelaz_3"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_6", 1024, CVector(884.265, 426.633, 513.715), {"CoolBelaz_2"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_7", 1024, CVector(890.208, 426.636, 535.705), {"Ural00"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_8", 1024, CVector(921.300, 428.461, 528.581), {"Cruiser02"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_9", 1024, CVector(952.114, 430.171, 523.023), {"Hunter02"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_10", 1024, CVector(893.755, 428.125, 471.966), {"Ural02"}, nil, 1) TeamCreateWithWarez("Gonch_11", 1024, CVector(919.515, 429.560, 468.786), {"Ural03"}, nil, 1)
Fly("Nachalo_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 8, 1, 0 ) Fly("Nachalo_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 6, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 0, 1 )
TActivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle2") TActivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle3") TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(960.707, 430.766, 464.557)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703))
end
local Goncha111 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_1_vehicle_0") if Goncha111 then Goncha111:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha111:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha111:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha111:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha21 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_2_vehicle_0") if Goncha21 then Goncha21:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha21:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha21:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha21:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha31 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_3_vehicle_0") if Goncha31 then Goncha31:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha31:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha31:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha31:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha1111 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_11_vehicle_0") if Goncha1111 then Goncha1111:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha1111:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha1111:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha1111:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha41 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_4_vehicle_0") if Goncha41 then Goncha41:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha41:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha41:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha41:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha51 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_5_vehicle_0") if Goncha51 then Goncha51:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha51:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha51:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha51:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha61 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_6_vehicle_0") if Goncha61 then Goncha61:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha61:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha61:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha61:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha71 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_7_vehicle_0") if Goncha71 then Goncha71:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha71:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha71:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha71:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha81 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_8_vehicle_0") if Goncha81 then Goncha81:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha81:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha81:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha81:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha91 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_9_vehicle_0") if Goncha91 then Goncha91:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha91:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha91:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha91:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
local Goncha101 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_10_vehicle_0") if Goncha101 then Goncha101:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.711, -0.015, -0.703)) Goncha101:SetForcedMaxTorque(1500) Goncha101:SetMaxSpeed(2000) Goncha101:SetCruisingSpeed(1500) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_end
trigger.script:
local Goncha1 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_1") if Goncha1 then Goncha1:StackOpen() Goncha1:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha1:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha1:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha1:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha1:StackClose() end
local Goncha2 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_2") if Goncha2 then Goncha2:StackOpen() Goncha2:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha2:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha2:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha2:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha2:StackClose() end
local Goncha3 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_3") if Goncha3 then Goncha3:StackOpen() Goncha3:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha3:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha3:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha3:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha3:StackClose() end
local Goncha11 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_11") if Goncha11 then Goncha11:StackOpen() Goncha11:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha11:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha11:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha11:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha11:StackClose() end
local Goncha4 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_4") if Goncha4 then Goncha4:StackOpen() Goncha4:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha4:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha4:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha4:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha4:StackClose() end
local Goncha5 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_5") if Goncha5 then Goncha5:StackOpen() Goncha5:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha5:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha5:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha5:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha5:StackClose() end
local Goncha6 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_6") if Goncha6 then Goncha6:StackOpen() Goncha6:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha6:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha6:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha6:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha6:StackClose() end
local Goncha7 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_7") if Goncha7 then Goncha7:StackOpen() Goncha7:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha7:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha7:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha7:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha7:StackClose() end
local Goncha8 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_8") if Goncha8 then Goncha8:StackOpen() Goncha8:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha8:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha8:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha8:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha8:StackClose() end
local Goncha9 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_9") if Goncha9 then Goncha9:StackOpen() Goncha9:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha9:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha9:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha9:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha9:StackClose() end
local Goncha10 = GetEntityByName("Gonch_10") if Goncha10 then Goncha10:StackOpen() Goncha10:SetDestination( CVector(1949.056, 421.111, 952.906) ) Goncha10:SetDestination( CVector(3177.985, 235.684, 1490.764) ) Goncha10:SetDestination( CVector(3337.240, 232.274, 2766.073) ) Goncha10:SetDestination( CVector(2376.985, 232.810, 3366.149) ) Goncha10:StackClose() end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Race01")
TActivate("CheckPointTR1")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TDeactivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle2") TDeactivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle3")
SetTolerance( 1100, 1024, RS_ALLY )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CheckPointTR4
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Race_quest4") TActivate("CheckPointTR5")
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddModifier("hp","+ 1500") end trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CheckPointTR5
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Race_quest5") TActivate("CheckPointTR6")
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddModifier("hp","+ 1500") end trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CheckPointTR6
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Race_quest6") TActivate("CheckPointTR7")
local BD111 = GetEntityByName("BanditDemon1") if BD111 then BD111:Remove() end
local BD112 = GetEntityByName("BanditDemon2") if BD112 then BD112:Remove() end
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: AtakaDemons_cin
trigger.script:
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Race_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 6, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 2, 1 )
TeamCreate("BanditDemon1", 1005, CVector(3465.241, 255.319, 3144.229), {"Ural03","Ural02","Ural01","Ural02","Ural00"}, CVector(3124.244, 227.095, 3313.060), 1) TeamCreate("BanditDemon2", 1005, CVector(3249.456, 240.630, 3515.279), {"Ural02","CoolBelaz_2","Ural01","Ural02","CoolBelaz_3"}, CVector(3124.244, 227.095, 3313.060), 1)
TActivate("AtakaDemons_cin_vehicle") TActivate("AtakaDemons_cin_dop_1") TActivate( "AtakaDemons_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: AtakaDemons_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0)
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: AtakaDemons_cin_end
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(30) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(30) end
TeamCreate("BanditDemon3", 1005, CVector(1936.241, 235.319, 3297.229), {"CoolBelaz_3","Ural02","Cruiser01"}, CVector(3124.244, 227.095, 3313.060), 1) TeamCreate("BanditDemon4", 1005, CVector(1133.456, 250.630, 3377.279), {"Ural02","CoolBelaz","Ural01","Ural02","CoolBelaz_3"}, nil, 1)
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Race02")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TDeactivate("AtakaDemons_cin_dop_1")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Finish_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue04") SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Race_cam04", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 10, 1, 0 ) Fly("Race_cam05", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 5, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 3, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 4, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 5, 0.5 )
TeamCreate("BanditDemon22", 1005, CVector(455.008, 421.745, 1173.631), {"Ural02","CoolBelaz_2","Ural01","Ural02","CoolBelaz_3"}, CVector(379.703, 435, 946.095), 1)
TActivate("Finish_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Finish_cin_dop_1") TActivate( "Finish_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Finish_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
CreateVehicleEx("MirotvorecFury01","Furry1", CVector(379.703, 435, 946.095), 1066)
local vehPlayer11 = GetEntityByName("Furry1") if vehPlayer11 then vehPlayer11:SetSkin(2) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Finish_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 6, 0.5 )
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Pizdec_path") end
local vehPlayer1 = GetEntityByName("Furry1") if vehPlayer1 then vehPlayer1:SetExternalPathByName("Pizdec_path") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Finish_cin_end
trigger.script:
PassToMap("r4m1", "FromR4M2", -1 , true)
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate("Finish_cin_dop_1")
trigger:Deactivate()
